Here is the story:
 
Mr. Epstein, Dan, Bill and Miles looked at some changes which had to be made to two small islands to permit a 40’ container to be moved from the dock area up to the proposed construction road
The changes were taped out and walked
The changes were approved by JE at that time
The changes are noted in the attachment in red. The blue marks the road alignment used to get to the compound when coming from the helipad.
Work was done to make these changes today
Bruce White took a picture apparently in the middle of the process which showed rocks piled up in the road
These rocks are to be re-used
The work will be completed by noon on Monday and pictures can be taken again.
The Owner’s road up to the house was in involved in this work. 
 
I will call to explain the drawing.


 
____________________________________________________________________________________

Here is the story:

 

  1. Mr. Epstein, Dan, Bill and Miles looked at some changes which had to be made to two small islands to permit a 40’ container to be moved from the dock area up to the proposed construction road
  2. The changes were taped out and walked
  3. The changes were approved by JE at that time
  4. The changes are noted in the attachment in red. The blue marks the road alignment used to get to the compound when coming from the helipad.
  5. Work was done to make these changes today
  6. Bruce White took a picture apparently in the middle of the process which showed rocks piled up in the road
  7. These rocks are to be re-used
  8. The work will be completed by noon on Monday and pictures can be taken again.
  9. The Owner’s road up to the house was in involved in this work.

 

I will call to explain the drawing.
